action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 4 eval failed with AttributeError: 'DummyVecEnv' object has no attribute 'save_running_average', caused by predict.py using VecEnv wrappers incorrectly and mishandling reset returns. Analysis: The predict.py used DummyVecEnv/VecNormalize which caused multiple bugs (reset returns tuple, env.close inside episode loop). The SB3 predict method itself doesn't touch env, but our code's obs = env.reset() didn't unpack the tuple leading to downstream errors. A simpler single-gym-env approach per episode, following the minimal template, avoids all VecEnv issues and still works with PPO.load without env. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to use gym.make directly, load model with PPO.load (no env), and manually normalize observations if vecnorm stats exist. Submit eval immediately with existing ckpt/walk model to verify pipeline.
